articles.title: Mass. man charged with murdering father, allegedly told police he killed family member
articles.description:
David Boucher, 48, is charged with first degree murder and is scheduled to appear in court on June 12 for a pretrial hearing, the DA said.

The post Mass. man charged with murdering father, allegedly told police he killed family member appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: David Boucher, 48, charged with first degree murder of his father.
Boucher's pretrial hearing is scheduled for June 12, 2026.
Local community grapples with the implications of this violent crime.

articles.title: Worcester man, 62, killed by vehicle while crossing street, police say
articles.description:
The man was fatally injured when he was struck by a vehicle near Hope Avenue on Sunday night, Worcester police said.

The post Worcester man, 62, killed by vehicle while crossing street, police say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Worcester police report a 62-year-old man was killed by a vehicle on Sunday night.
The incident occurred near Hope Avenue, highlighting pedestrian safety concerns in the area.
Local residents may advocate for improved crosswalks and traffic measures following this tragedy.

articles.title: Bruins’ Charlie McAvoy suspended 6 games for slashing Sabres’ Zach Benson
articles.description:
This marks the third time that McAvoy has been suspended in his NHL career.

The post Bruins’ Charlie McAvoy suspended 6 games for slashing Sabres’ Zach Benson appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins' Charlie McAvoy suspended for 6 games following a slashing incident.
This is McAvoy's third suspension in his NHL career.
Boston Bruins will be without McAvoy, impacting team performance in upcoming games.
